title: rosa × dumetorum f. morgana
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. morgana, also known as Morgana rose or Rosa morgana, is a hybrid rose species that is a cross between Rosa dumetorum and Rosa gallica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. morgana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
